name: meta-eval run on known-bad calibration enforces the at-least-1-finding-per-anti-pattern floor
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/meta-eval/run.sh" --target known-bad --anti-patterns-stub a=0,b=1 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'anti_pattern=a findings=0' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
